lintExempt.rationale: Bootstrap absorption of pre-C1-bis grep-based verification smells (F36 source-tree grep, F56 passed-grep and multi-grep-pipe variants). New drift must use F-rule-specified patterns. Unwind via grep -l 2026-04-13-c1-bootstrap .ai-workspace/plans/*.json.

stories.title: Expand generate.ts input schema to accept all parameters

acceptanceCriteria.description: generateInputSchema includes planJson, planPath, evalReport, iteration, maxIterations, previousScores, fileHashes, projectPath params
acceptanceCriteria.command: grep -q 'planJson' server/tools/generate.ts && grep -q 'planPath' server/tools/generate.ts && grep -q 'evalReport' server/tools/generate.ts && grep -q 'iteration' server/tools/generate.ts && grep -q 'maxIterations' server/tools/generate.ts && grep -q 'previousScores' server/tools/generate.ts && grep -q 'fileHashes' server/tools/generate.ts && grep -q 'projectPath' server/tools/generate.ts

acceptanceCriteria.description: generateInputSchema includes prdContent, masterPlanContent, phasePlanContent, contextFiles params
acceptanceCriteria.command: grep -q 'prdContent' server/tools/generate.ts && grep -q 'masterPlanContent' server/tools/generate.ts && grep -q 'phasePlanContent' server/tools/generate.ts && grep -q 'contextFiles' server/tools/generate.ts

acceptanceCriteria.description: TypeScript compilation succeeds with expanded schema

stories.title: Wire handleGenerate to call core logic from PH-01/02/03

acceptanceCriteria.description: handleGenerate with storyId and planJson returns action 'implement' with brief
acceptanceCriteria.command: npx vitest run server/tools/generate.test.ts -t 'init returns implement\|init.*implement' 2>&1 | grep -q 'passed'

acceptanceCriteria.description: handleGenerate with evalReport returns action 'fix' with fixBrief when conditions allow
acceptanceCriteria.command: npx vitest run server/tools/generate.test.ts -t 'iterate returns fix\|fix.*iteration' 2>&1 | grep -q 'passed'

acceptanceCriteria.description: handleGenerate returns action 'escalate' when stopping conditions met
handleGenerate returns isError when neither planPath nor planJson provided
acceptanceCriteria.command: npx vitest run server/tools/generate.test.ts -t 'no plan\|missing.*plan\|error.*no.*plan' 2>&1 | grep -q 'passed'

acceptanceCriteria.description: forge_generate tool description updated in index.ts to reflect full capabilities
acceptanceCriteria.command: grep -q 'brief assembler' server/index.ts || grep -q 'GAN loop controller' server/index.ts || grep -q 'stopping conditions' server/index.ts

stories.title: Integration tests: full init-fix-escalate cycle and NFR verification

acceptanceCriteria.description: Integration test covers full cycle: init → fix → escalate (plateau after 3 identical scores)
acceptanceCriteria.command: npx vitest run server/tools/generate.test.ts -t 'full cycle\|init.*fix.*escalate\|integration' 2>&1 | grep -q 'passed'

acceptanceCriteria.description: NFR-01: Zero callClaude imports in forge_generate's full dependency chain (all non-test source files)
acceptanceCriteria.command: ! grep -rn 'callClaude' server/tools/generate.ts server/lib/generator.ts server/lib/plan-loader.ts server/types/generate-result.ts $(find server/lib -name '*.ts' ! -name '*.test.ts' | sort) 2>/dev/null | grep -v '\.test\.' | grep -q 'callClaude'

acceptanceCriteria.description: NFR-02: forge_generate init call completes in under 5 seconds
acceptanceCriteria.command: npx vitest run server/tools/generate.test.ts -t 'response time\|under.*5.*second\|performance' 2>&1 | grep -q 'passed'

acceptanceCriteria.description: NFR-03: Windows path safety — no colons in generated filenames, forward-slash safe
NFR-04: forge_generate does not modify execution plan, project files, or git state (read-only)
NFR-06: forge_generate accepts execution plans with schemaVersion 3.0.0
Full test suite passes (npm test)
TypeScript compilation succeeds with zero errors
NFR-02: forge_generate iteration call completes in under 2 seconds

stories.title: Dogfood: run forge_generate against a real execution plan with real ACs

acceptanceCriteria.description: Dogfood report exists documenting a real forge_generate init call result
Dogfood report documents a real forge_generate fix iteration call result
Dogfood report documents a real forge_generate escalation call result
SC-01 verified: forge_generate is registered as an MCP tool and callable
